summary: A pacey, direct 4-3-3 with excellent defensive structure — 2nd best defence and 2nd lowest xG against. The author's favourite watch from Euro 2024.
style: 4-3-3 — pacey & direct front-3, fluid rotations in central midfield, great rest-defence & structure.

counterReliance.note: Direct front-3 backed by elite structure

strengths: Fluid central-midfield rotations and strong rest-defence
tactics: Defend superbly and break with a quick front three, with the midfield rotating to keep the ball moving. Hard to play through, dangerous on the move.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
